answers: Compare prices, wait for sales, read reviews, set budget, check return policies.
Always compare prices across platforms, look out for seasonal sales, and don't forget to check the return policy before buying.
Set a budget first, read user reviews, and wait for big sale events like 11.11 or Black Friday for the best deals.
Smart shopping tip: compare on multiple sites, read at least 10 reviews, and always check if free returns are available.
